title: aira caryophyllea var. curta
intro:
Aira caryophyllea var. curta, also known as Wood Meadow-grass or Curta Meadow-grass, is a rare and lesser-known subspecies of the Aira caryophyllea plant, which is a species of grass native to Europe.

The Wood Meadow-grass has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Its health benefits are mainly associated with soothing and calming effects, making it a potential remedy for anxiety, insomnia, and digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
